description_long: This coatrack features a minimalist, industrial design with a rectangular frame constructed from tubular metal. It consists of two vertical posts connected by four evenly spaced horizontal bars, providing ample space for hanging coats, hats, or scarves. The lower section includes diagonal support bars for added stability, while the top ends of the vertical posts are capped and slightly extended. The structure is entirely black, giving it a sleek and modern appearance suitable for urban environments. There are no visible hooks or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for high-traffic areas such as building entrances, garages, or public lobbies.
description: A sleek, black metal coatrack with four horizontal bars and diagonal supports, designed for stability and utility in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame, four horizontal bars, and diagonal supports.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the coatrack, with only the vertical post visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same bar and support arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim vertical post profile.
